common.securityNotice: For security reasons, never share this code with anyone. {companyName} will never request your password or verification codes by email or phone.

orderConfirmation.preview: Thanks {customerName}! Your order has been confirmed 🧡
orderConfirmation.paymentPendingMessage: Payment pending. As soon as payment is confirmed, we'll start processing your order.
orderConfirmation.paymentPendingDescription: Your order has been successfully placed. Please complete payment so we can start processing your order. Payment details are below.
orderConfirmation.paymentConfirmedMessage: ✓ Payment confirmed. Your order is being processed.
orderConfirmation.confirmationText: We've received your order and we're preparing it for shipping. You'll receive another email when your order has been shipped.
orderConfirmation.footerQuestion: If you have any questions about your order, please contact us at
orderConfirmation.subject: Order Confirmation #{orderId}

message.pending: Your order is pending and will be processed shortly.
message.processing: Your order is being prepared in our warehouses.
message.complete: Great news! Your order is complete and ready!
message.delivered: Your order has been delivered. We hope you love it!
message.cancelled: Your order has been cancelled. Contact our support if you have questions.

adminNotification.subject: New Order #{orderId} - {customerName} - {total}€
adminNotification.actionRequired: Action required: New order to process
adminNotification.newOrderMessage: A new order has just been placed in your store. Here are all the details to process this order:
adminNotification.name: Name
adminNotification.adminEmail: This email was sent to the administrative team.
adminNotification.paymentConfirmedMessage: Payment for this order has been confirmed and the order is ready to be processed.

orderStatusUpdate.subject: Order Status Update #{orderId}
orderStatusUpdate.preview: Your order #{orderId} status has been updated
orderStatusUpdate.title: Order Status Update
orderStatusUpdate.statusCompleteMessage: Your order is complete and ready!

passwordReset.subject: Password Reset Code
passwordReset.title: Password Reset Request
passwordReset.message: We received a request to reset the password for your {companyName} account. Use the verification code below to reset your password:
passwordReset.codeExpiry: This code will expire in 15 minutes for security reasons.
passwordReset.noRequest: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email or contact our support team if you have concerns.

emailVerification.subject: Verify Your Email Address
emailVerification.title: Verify Your Email Address
emailVerification.message: Thank you for signing up with {companyName}! To complete your registration and secure your account, please verify your email address using the code below:
emailVerification.instructions: Enter this code in the verification form to activate your account. This code will expire in 24 hours.
emailVerification.noAccount: If you didn't create an account with {companyName}, please ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to {companyName}!
welcome.title: Hello {userName}! 👋
welcome.excited: We're super excited to have you with us 🎉
welcome.familyMessage: You've just joined the {companyName} family, and we can tell you: you'll feel right at home here.
welcome.whatWeDo: Stylish, comfortable clothing made with love - that's what we do best. And now, it's for you too!
welcome.surprises: 👉 Surprises, new releases, exclusive offers (and a bit of love too 💌) coming very soon.
welcome.browseCollections: In the meantime, feel free to browse our collections:
welcome.needHelp: Need help or advice on sizes/styles? Write to us, we're here for you!

userCreated.subject: Your Account Has Been Created
userCreated.title: Welcome to {companyName}!
userCreated.message: Your account has been successfully created. Here are your login details:
userCreated.changePassword: Please log in to your account and change your password as soon as possible.

userUpdated.subject: Your Account Has Been Updated
userUpdated.title: Account Update Notification
userUpdated.message: Your account information has been updated. Here are the changes:
userUpdated.securityWarning: If you didn't make these changes, please contact our support team immediately.

newsletter.subject: News from {companyName}
newsletter.footerText: You're receiving this email because you subscribed to the {companyName} newsletter.

customerMessage.subject: Message from {companyName}
customerMessage.preview: You have a new message from {companyName}
